# opnsense_ipsec_pool (Resource)

Manages an IPsec virtual IP address pool on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `addresses` (String) Address subnet handed out by this pool (CIDR).
- `name` (String) Unique pool name.

### Optional

- `dns` (Set of String) DNS servers offered to clients from this pool.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this pool is enabled.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
